purpose: Review public-sector infrastructure, immovable asset, project governance and DMS implementation documents against applicable legislation, frameworks, standards, guidelines, templates and client policies.
primary_inputs: Any additional source framework uploaded for the review

gap_rating_model.meaning: Legal, governance, audit or approval requirement is missing. Document may not be fit for approval.
Important requirement is partly addressed but insufficient for audit or implementation.
Requirement is addressed at a high level but needs detail, evidence or consistency.
Formatting, terminology, cross-reference or presentation improvement.

review_rules: Identify the document type before reviewing.
Compare the document against mandatory requirements.
Separate legal non-compliance from best-practice improvement items.
Where frameworks conflict, prioritise legislation first, then client policy, then best-practice framework.
